AUTH.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests, please try again later (code: 3)

SUBSCRIPTION.NOT_SUBSCRIBED: You are not subscribed to this service (code: 1003)

NEWS.INVALID_POLL: Invalid poll: at least two options, visibility settings and a future expiry are required (code: 2306)
NEWS.NOT_A_POLL: This post is not a poll (code: 2307)
NEWS.POLL_EXPIRED: The poll is closed; voting is no longer possible (code: 2308)
NEWS.OPTIONS_FROZEN: Options can no longer be changed: votes have already been cast (code: 2309)
NEWS.INVALID_VOTE: Invalid vote: unknown options or an incorrect number of choices (code: 2310)
NEWS.GET_RESULTS: Failed to retrieve the poll results (code: 2312)
